summary: The Amazon India homepage has several design issues related to visual hierarchy, contrast, spacing, alignment, and consistency.

findings.issue: The 'Update location' link is not prominent and has a low font size, making it hard to notice.
findings.user_impact: Users may miss the option to update their location, potentially affecting their shopping experience.
findings.recommendation: Increase font size and make it more prominent.

findings.issue: The search bar background color has low contrast with the surrounding elements.
findings.user_impact: Users may find it hard to focus on the search bar.
findings.recommendation: Increase contrast between search bar and surrounding elements.

findings.user_impact: Users may find it hard to distinguish between sections.

findings.issue: Section headings are not aligned to a grid.
findings.user_impact: Users may find it hard to scan the page.
findings.recommendation: Align section headings to a grid.

findings.issue: Product images have varying aspect ratios.
findings.user_impact: Users may find it hard to compare products.
